site.name: Tsukiakari Japanese School
site.tagline: Gentle guidance, like moonlight — learn Japanese your way.
site.description: Online and in-person lessons available. For English and Chinese speakers, and heritage language learners abroad.

hero.headline: You love Japan. That's enough to start.
hero.subtext: Online and in-person lessons available. For English and Chinese speakers, and heritage language learners abroad.
hero.ctaSub: Feel free to reach out anytime

items.title: Multilingual Support
items.desc: Lessons conducted with English or Chinese support — perfect for complete beginners.

items.title: Online & In-Person
items.desc: Join from anywhere in the world, or attend in-person lessons near Tokyo.

items.title: Heritage Language Education
items.desc: Specialized instruction for Japanese children living abroad to maintain their reading and writing skills.

items.title: Personalized Lessons
items.desc: Curriculum tailored to your goals, level, and pace so you can build skills steadily.

about.heading: About
about.story: Tsukiakari Japanese School was born from a desire to provide a warm and reliable learning environment for everyone who wants to learn Japanese. Just as moonlight gently reaches every corner, we support your Japanese learning at your own pace, in a way that suits you.
about.teacherBio: Certified Japanese language teacher with experience teaching English and Chinese speakers. With the motto "Language is a bridge between people," every lesson is tailored to the individual student.
qualificationsList: Registered Japanese Language Teacher (certified by the Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology)
Completed Comprehensive Japanese Language Teacher Training Program (420 hours, Agency for Cultural Affairs guidelines)
Able to communicate in English and Chinese
Experience teaching learners from English-speaking and Asian countries

courses.heading: Courses & Fees
courses.subheading: Choose the course that fits your goals and level. Trial lessons are available for all courses.

highlights.name: Private Lessons
highlights.desc: Choose 60, 90, or 120 minutes. Available as a single lesson or a 4-lesson ticket.

highlights.name: Group Lessons
highlights.desc: Learn with friends or a partner. Classes arranged to fit your group's size and level.

highlights.name: Start with a Trial
highlights.desc: Not sure which course fits? Try a trial lesson first and experience the teaching style.

courses.note: * Fees are subject to change. Please contact us for details.

contact.heading: Contact & Trial Lesson Booking
contact.subheading: Feel free to reach out. We usually respond within 2–3 business days.

form.name: Name
